scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r public/* dist/ && bun ./scripts/inject-build-info.js dist/index.html
scripts.build:pages: echo "No page build step configured yet"
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:assets && bun run build:pages
scripts.preview: bun run build && bun run serve dist -l 3000
